selection_basis: prior test results showing ASR capability
model supports 52 languages including Chinese and English

skipped_datasets.reason: S2TT (Speech-to-Text-Translation) task not supported by model. Model README explicitly marks CoVoST2 as 'Not applicable' for ASR model.
SER (Speech Emotion Recognition) task not supported. Model is ASR-only per README capability documentation.
Chinese multi-accent ASR dataset - could be supported but not in current default scope. Can be added in future evaluation rounds.
More challenging English ASR split - deferring to prioritize clean eval first. Can be added in follow-up rounds.
